text.title: LLM Drift Daily Triage Procedure
text.summary: Six-step daily procedure (≤15 min) for drift triage and decision logging.

step.name: pull-metrics
step.input: Yesterday's eval-run JSON + refusal-log JSONL + cost-log JSONL.
step.action: Runner pulls and aggregates. Outputs three numbers vs the previous 7-day rolling baseline.
step.decision-gate: Any input missing → flag as data-pipeline incident, separate from drift.

step.name: compute-deltas
step.action: Compute pp deltas for eval-score and refusal-rate; pct delta for cost.

step.name: surface-traces
step.action: Pick top 3 (by impact) and write 1-sentence summary + expected vs got per case.
step.decision-gate: If 0 failing cases on a known-noisy day, double-check the eval ran at all.

step.name: decide
step.input: Deltas + traces + threshold table from rule r4.
step.action: Apply thresholds → decision ∈ {continue, mitigate, escalate}. Write a 1-sentence rationale.
step.decision-gate: If decision contradicts thresholds, owner must justify in follow_up.

step.name: log
step.action: Append triage-report.json to the immutable log (git commit, S3 versioned object, etc.). Post a 5-line summary to the team channel.
step.decision-gate: No retro edits; corrections go in tomorrow's entry referencing today's.

step.name: schedule-follow-up
step.action: Create ticket / page on-call / open incident channel per the playbook. Set follow-up review date.
step.decision-gate: Decision = escalate without ticket id = invalid report.
